metadata.description: Curated agent skills bundled by category from devantler-tech/agent-skills

plugins.name: gitops-kubernetes
plugins.description: Flux CD debugging, knowledge, repository auditing, and tenant onboarding — skills plus the Flux MCP server and a read-only Flux troubleshooter agent for live-cluster debugging

plugins.name: github
plugins.description: GitHub CLI, stacked PRs, Actions docs, and issue management skills

plugins.name: agentic-engineering
plugins.description: Agentic AI framework SDKs, AI-assistant instruction authoring, and skill discovery

plugins.name: go
plugins.description: Go best practices, concurrency, generics, interfaces, and testing skills

plugins.name: engineering-practices
plugins.description: Git commits, conventional releases, refactoring, test-driven development, and engineering ways of working skills

plugins.name: frontend-design
plugins.description: Astro, frontend design, and web design guidelines skills

plugins.name: vibe-coding
plugins.description: Build a product by conversation alone — a plain-language build companion agent plus skills for needs-to-stack translation, an allowed-stack guardrail, and a jargon-free voice; for people with no technical background

plugins.name: automated-ai-engineer
plugins.description: The autonomous engineer role for a whole portfolio of repositories — a run-loop engineer agent and a read-only surveyor agent plus skills for portfolio maintenance, product engineering, and guard-railed self-improvement; generic, configured by the consuming repo's AGENTS.md contract sections
